So, Anvith decides to do everything right so that their parents don't fight, but end up ruining everything which leads to a more heated argument.

programme.title: Barat
programme.desc: A Typical miser starts picking up a mysterious trail of money only to find out something unearthly lurking around!

programme.title: Make Her Happy
programme.desc: Nandita and Rahul are to be married soon. They are a live-in couple. Things take a U-turn when Rahul gets a call from his ex-girlfriend 'Suhana'. Will Rahul be able to save himself? Watch to find out who has trapped whom.

programme.title: Harmless
programme.desc: A boy down on his luck. A girl looking for thrills. A plot is hatched. A kidnapping is staged. As far as crimes go, this one seems harmless. But, as with all things, there is a price to pay. A hefty price. Harmless begins as a crime-thriller and develops into a dramatic adventure with a little bit of romance thrown in.

programme.title: Laugh
programme.desc: A film about who we were and who we've become , how socialising was and where its reached ,how something as simple as laughing has taken a complicated turn

programme.title: L
programme.desc: A mother's dream of riding a scooter is not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: Love, Bites
programme.desc: Love, bites is a romantic drama where the story revolves around the lives of Karthik, an artist, and Meghna, scientist. Their sexual chemistry is obvious to everyone. Even to those who haven’t seen them together, since they like to flaunt the hickeys on their body. But something changes in their equation when the hickey becomes a bridge of memory that leads to an old sexual encounter Meghna had which Karthik finds out about. Will Meghna be able to help Karthik erase the marks of her past? Or will Karthik just to have to wake up to a realization that the past, even though it haunts, might not be real.

programme.title: One Faith
programme.desc: Sometimes, all it takes for a melting pot to turn into a blazing furnace is a mere spark. Especially in a country like ours, where multiple faiths co-exist and cross paths every day. This is the day in the life of India, where two dominant forces face-off in a battle of who-blinks-first. And only one faith will triumph.

programme.title: Agarbatti
programme.desc: Bhola, who is mentally challenged but still manages to survive by himself, selling incense sticks on the roads. An accident takes place near bhola, he doesn’t see the person clearly who is driving the car. Will he be able to tell the police about this incident?

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: We all have a fantastic life but we spoil it with our silly ideas of how to live it. This story is about how in trying to define a relationship, we actually end up confining it. One such definition is marriage and this is what is discussed in Cheers by two intimately close friends - one of whom is helping the other decide against a bad marriage that she has chosen to live with for some time now, thus stifling herself from all the happiness she is entitled to. While the intent of the friend seem questionable, the story is about why she trusts him more than anyone else with this issue that she is facing

programme.title: A Situation
programme.desc: A widower father, Pradeep has adapted to the challenging life of raising a daughter single-handedly after demise of his wife. One fine morning, she undergoes menstrual bleeding while taking a bath. Helpless and terrified she is locked inside the bathroom, not answering her father. He does not understand what to do next. This film shows that even today, periods stand as the biggest question to a lot of parents.

programme.title: 10.30 Lets Go To School
programme.desc: Disha is an ordinary village girl with dreams like any other kid. Not only does she love her father unconditionally, but also her books and school. Life takes an unexpected turn when her Baba and Bua decide to discontinue their education. Her fate is about to meet that of thousands of other children who drop out of school every year. However, it is not so easy to give up. She is intelligent, confident and above all, determined to get back what she rightfully deserves, her right to dream!

programme.title: Bena
programme.desc: After a set of jewelry goes missing, the police search Bena's bag. Her employers, Bhai and Bhabhi, are shocked to see the contents. They throw her out and Bena spends the day calling people for jobs. The family driver calls Bena and informs her that the set was found. Bena knew that the set would be found as it was misplaced not stolen. Next, she gets a call for a new job. Bena finds out that her employer Bhabhi had recommended Bena. Why was Bena thrown out of her job? What in the bag?

programme.title: Aamad
programme.desc: "Aamad" in essence is the story of a father and son and their shared inheritance of loss. An inheritance that tears them apart and yet binds them together. Abhay returns home to find his father on his deathbed. Old painful memories resurface. Will he be able to make amends for the faults of his past? As his father passes on, will this be Abhay’s rites of passage? Will Abhay heed the call of the bloodline, despite the tinkering strains of the past?

programme.title: Kaande Pohe
programme.desc: Kaande Pohe - A Maharashtrian snack traditionally served when a boy visits a girls' family for the first time in an arranged marriage set up. The day is called 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'. There is no data on this strategy's success rate. Meet Sanjay and Manisha who are on their 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'.

programme.title: ABC
programme.desc: For some people life is about triumph against all odds, for some; life is only about complexities. Some walk through this road aimlessly and some; actually become the bridge. ABC is a short film that showcases the dichotomy between two extreme yet simple individuals. It is an empowering film which has the dexterity & optimism to resonate amongst all sections of audience. As humans, we do tend to forget that we are but one world than just mere economy, that it can just take one human, just one moment, just one action to turn around the paths of millions. ABC; is just a sweet gentle reminder of this thought.

programme.title: Jai Mata Di
programme.desc: Mumbai is a funny city. Call it a melting pot, the glamour capital, or simply the most open and safe place to be around. But when it comes to two people living under the same roof without a marriage certificate, it’s not religion, caste, or even the parents that’s the biggest hurdle. It’s a species that dictates the law of the land without really owning it. The Society Secretary. But as they say, there’s nothing mom can’t solve. With that belief on the one hand, and a funny bone in the other, we say Jai Mata Di!

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: Mukesh is a widower and has a 28-year-old so Rahul. They live together and rarely talk amicably with each other. Rahul thinks his father is too weird for his age whereas Mukesh thinks why Rahul constantly judges him for his choices.

programme.title: Holding Back
programme.desc: Short Film Holding back a short film is based on a true incident in 1999, of Shiva, a young man suffering from blood cancer and who, unfortunately, passed away during the journey while traveling by train from Bangalore to Chennai, for a friend’s marriage. Shiva was traveling with his mom and elder cousin Suresh. This film deals with the mother’s emotional journey of her son’s death. The pivotal character- Mother, is played by the national award winner Seema Biswas, popularly known for her role in and as the Bandit Queen; while Father is played by national award-winning director-writer Ananth Mahadevan; Coolie is played by Aditya Lakhia (Kachra) of Lagaan fame; Cousin brother is played by Raj Arjun, main lead in Shabri and Kaalo, Shiva, the son is played by Kunal Kumar with supporting roles played by Marathi theatre and film veterans, Pradeep Patwardhan and Jaywanth Wadekar. Background score is to be given by Anurag Saikia, the national award winner for the music of Yugadrashta in 2014. The camerawork is done by Pushpank Gawade who won the best award for Cinematography for the film Kaalo in South Africa film festival 2012.

programme.title: Naamkaran
programme.desc: When it comes to new beginnings, families have a way of always being there. Sometimes it's as simple as a good- morning forward. But for Jay, it's something slightly more dramatic. Watch Naamkaran, as Jay and his (uninvited) family take on a new challenge.

programme.title: Khujli
programme.desc: What happens when Girdharilal and Roopmati decide to scratch a 25-year-old itch? Secret desires come out, hidden fantasies are revealed, long-lost fire is rekindled, and things can’t help but get a little…kinky.

programme.title: Desh Ki Pardesh ?
programme.desc: The film follows the Parikh's on their visit to their children settled in the US. However, to only realize that there's a lot more than just a generation gap between them. Mainly, dawning upon Hasmuk Parikh's that it's great to dream big for your children, but one must be mentally prepared that those dreams may or not have them in it.

programme.title: Suno
programme.desc: An experimental night in bed ends up with a mark for the world to see. As the world looks at the mark left in bed, the couple is forced to look inside themselves and their relationship.

programme.title: ABC
programme.desc: For some people life is about triumph against all odds, for some; life is only about complexities. Some walk through this road aimlessly and some; actually become the bridge. ABC is a short film that showcases the dichotomy between two extreme yet simple individuals. It is an empowering film which has the dexterity & optimism to resonate amongst all sections of audience. As humans, we do tend to forget that we are but one world than just mere economy, that it can just take one human, just one moment, just one action to turn around the paths of millions. ABC; is just a sweet gentle reminder of this thought.

programme.title: Family
programme.desc: Anvith's friend Karthik is leaving school and moving to another city as his parents are getting divorced. This news makes Anvith very sad. The reason for their divorce which Karthik reveals to Anvith is a regular heated argument between Karthik's parents. Then Anvith also starts noticing the same argument between his parents. So, Anvith decides to do everything right so that their parents don't fight, but end up ruining everything which leads to a more heated argument.

programme.title: Homecoming
programme.desc: Happiness comes knocking at the door on one of her most gloomy days during the pandemic. She embraces it & now it ain't easy to go

programme.title: Kaande Pohe
programme.desc: Kaande Pohe - A Maharashtrian snack traditionally served when a boy visits a girls' family for the first time in an arranged marriage set up. The day is called 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'. There is no data on this strategy's success rate. Meet Sanjay and Manisha who are on their 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'.

programme.title: Long Drive
programme.desc: Vikram, Zain and Aman are on a long drive together. But when Vikram takes an unexpected turn, his friends aren’t sure what to expect. Will they make it back in time? And does Vikram have something on his mind? Watch Long Drive to find out.

programme.title: Make Her Happy
programme.desc: Nandita and Rahul are to be married soon. They are a live-in couple. Things take a U-turn when Rahul gets a call from his ex-girlfriend 'Suhana'. Will Rahul be able to save himself? Watch to find out who has trapped whom.

programme.title: Aakhri Sawari
programme.desc: Manish, a perfect husband and father, tormented by a mysterious parcel he receives from an anonymous sender has to make a life-changing decision. He shares his problems with his cab driver who listens patiently and tries to help. What the cab driver offers changes both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Barat
programme.desc: A Typical miser starts picking up a mysterious trail of money only to find out something unearthly lurking around!

programme.title: El'ayichi
programme.desc: What happens when you have a dead but clingy husband, an irritated wife, and a fossilized dodo in the same house? Experience love, way past its 'expiry' date.

programme.title: Haba Goba
programme.desc: Getting intimate takes a lot of planning in "these times". Nandini and Kush have done all that and more for their "special" date. But will things go as smoothly as planned? Or will there be bumps along the way?

programme.title: Pilibhit
programme.desc: Inspired by true stories, Siraj, a righteous, impoverished flute maker, resides at the edge of the forests of Pilibhit, North India, where man-eating tigers thrive. His mounting livelihood pressures and tragedies corner him to take a drastic measure that threatens to tear down his values and a loved one.

programme.title: Mamta Tonic
programme.desc: A travelling saleswoman. 3 potential customers. She weighs the pros of her homemade tonic against the cons of making tough choices in life.

programme.title: Kheer
programme.desc: As we age, life can get lonelier and the definition of relationships, mature. Kheer is a delightful serving of love and companionship where secrets get accidentally spilt and shared.

programme.title: Do Cutting
programme.desc: An unforgettable love story about how a couple due to societal pressures on inter religion marriages hold up their lives.

programme.title: A Tale Of An Onion Witch
programme.desc: Two flatmates, evidently from the gym-going North Indian breed of tinsel-town hopefuls, are warned about the 100 year old Witch that occasionally wanders around at night asking for an Onion. When an attractive neighbour knocks for help at midnight, their red-blooded fates unravel.

programme.title: Panic
programme.desc: A riveting psychological thriller that propels an aspiring actor's life into chaos when a toothache triggers an unfounded belief in oral cancer, setting off a catastrophic chain of events.

programme.title: Alvida
programme.desc: Break-ups can be hard, but sometimes they are necessary. Sometimes, you need all your strength to let go and say ... Alvida.

programme.title: An Astrologer's Day
programme.desc: Based on a short story by R.K. Narayan from Malgudi Days. A normal day in the life of an astrologer reveals a lot about him.

programme.title: Bena
programme.desc: After a set of jewelry goes missing, the police search Bena's bag. Her employers, Bhai and Bhabhi, are shocked to see the contents. They throw her out and Bena spends the day calling people for jobs. The family driver calls Bena and informs her that the set was found. Bena knew that the set would be found as it was misplaced not stolen. Next, she gets a call for a new job. Bena finds out that her employer Bhabhi had recommended Bena. Why was Bena thrown out of her job? What in the bag?

programme.title: Deuce
programme.desc: A mother and a son argue about love, insecurities and acceptance around an intense match of table tennis. Who wins? Who loses? Watch Deuce.

programme.title: Eelu Rani Bhag Gaye
programme.desc: Two teenagers running away from their home comes across a police officer who persuades them not to go, however Eelu & Rani have something else on their mind.

programme.title: Jai Mata Di
programme.desc: Mumbai is a funny city. Call it a melting pot, the glamour capital, or simply the most open and safe place to be around. But when it comes to two people living under the same roof without a marriage certificate, it’s not religion, caste, or even the parents that’s the biggest hurdle. It’s a species that dictates the law of the land without really owning it. The Society Secretary. But as they say, there’s nothing mom can’t solve. With that belief on the one hand, and a funny bone in the other, we say Jai Mata Di!

programme.title: L
programme.desc: A mother's dream of riding a scooter is not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: Naamkaran
programme.desc: When it comes to new beginnings, families have a way of always being there. Sometimes it's as simple as a good- morning forward. But for Jay, it's something slightly more dramatic. Watch Naamkaran, as Jay and his (uninvited) family take on a new challenge.

programme.title: Bhagwaan - The Faith
programme.desc: A final chance meeting with a mysterious old homeless man changes everything they’ve experienced that day. The story delves into how deep their faith truly is and how people worship gods. Some use faith and god as a means of solace while others as a crutch for a troubling life.

programme.title: Exchange Offer
programme.desc: A complaint registered to the manufacturing company for a dead computer brings back nostalgia and surprises in the life of a retired school principle who is living a mundane life.

programme.title: Rear View
programme.desc: Between 'Start Trip' and 'End Trip' there’s a journey that can potentially change lives, if only we open up and not let technology come in the way of human connection.

programme.title: Jai Mata Di
programme.desc: Mumbai is a funny city. Call it a melting pot, the glamour capital, or simply the most open and safe place to be around. But when it comes to two people living under the same roof without a marriage certificate, it’s not religion, caste, or even the parents that’s the biggest hurdle. It’s a species that dictates the law of the land without really owning it. The Society Secretary. But as they say, there’s nothing mom can’t solve. With that belief on the one hand, and a funny bone in the other, we say Jai Mata Di!

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: We all have a fantastic life but we spoil it with our silly ideas of how to live it. This story is about how in trying to define a relationship, we actually end up confining it. One such definition is marriage and this is what is discussed in Cheers by two intimately close friends - one of whom is helping the other decide against a bad marriage that she has chosen to live with for some time now, thus stifling herself from all the happiness she is entitled to. While the intent of the friend seem questionable, the story is about why she trusts him more than anyone else with this issue that she is facing

programme.title: Rear View
programme.desc: Between 'Start Trip' and 'End Trip' there’s a journey that can potentially change lives, if only we open up and not let technology come in the way of human connection.

programme.title: Holding Back
programme.desc: Short Film Holding back a short film is based on a true incident in 1999, of Shiva, a young man suffering from blood cancer and who, unfortunately, passed away during the journey while traveling by train from Bangalore to Chennai, for a friend’s marriage. Shiva was traveling with his mom and elder cousin Suresh. This film deals with the mother’s emotional journey of her son’s death. The pivotal character- Mother, is played by the national award winner Seema Biswas, popularly known for her role in and as the Bandit Queen; while Father is played by national award-winning director-writer Ananth Mahadevan; Coolie is played by Aditya Lakhia (Kachra) of Lagaan fame; Cousin brother is played by Raj Arjun, main lead in Shabri and Kaalo, Shiva, the son is played by Kunal Kumar with supporting roles played by Marathi theatre and film veterans, Pradeep Patwardhan and Jaywanth Wadekar. Background score is to be given by Anurag Saikia, the national award winner for the music of Yugadrashta in 2014. The camerawork is done by Pushpank Gawade who won the best award for Cinematography for the film Kaalo in South Africa film festival 2012.

programme.title: A Situation
programme.desc: A widower father, Pradeep has adapted to the challenging life of raising a daughter single-handedly after demise of his wife. One fine morning, she undergoes menstrual bleeding while taking a bath. Helpless and terrified she is locked inside the bathroom, not answering her father. He does not understand what to do next. This film shows that even today, periods stand as the biggest question to a lot of parents.

programme.title: Khujli
programme.desc: What happens when Girdharilal and Roopmati decide to scratch a 25-year-old itch? Secret desires come out, hidden fantasies are revealed, long-lost fire is rekindled, and things can’t help but get a little…kinky.

programme.title: Cuddly
programme.desc: Necessity is the mother of invention. But can it replace mother's love?

programme.title: Harmless
programme.desc: A boy down on his luck. A girl looking for thrills. A plot is hatched. A kidnapping is staged. As far as crimes go, this one seems harmless. But, as with all things, there is a price to pay. A hefty price. Harmless begins as a crime-thriller and develops into a dramatic adventure with a little bit of romance thrown in.

programme.title: Ved And Arya
programme.desc: Arya turns up unannounced at Ved’s home on a Friday night. Ved knows it's not just a regular surprise and that Arya has something else on her mind. Will all go down exactly as planned?

programme.title: Jai Mata Di
programme.desc: Mumbai is a funny city. Call it a melting pot, the glamour capital, or simply the most open and safe place to be around. But when it comes to two people living under the same roof without a marriage certificate, it’s not religion, caste, or even the parents that’s the biggest hurdle. It’s a species that dictates the law of the land without really owning it. The Society Secretary. But as they say, there’s nothing mom can’t solve. With that belief on the one hand, and a funny bone in the other, we say Jai Mata Di!

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: Mukesh is a widower and has a 28-year-old so Rahul. They live together and rarely talk amicably with each other. Rahul thinks his father is too weird for his age whereas Mukesh thinks why Rahul constantly judges him for his choices.

programme.title: Love, Bites
programme.desc: Love, bites is a romantic drama where the story revolves around the lives of Karthik, an artist, and Meghna, scientist. Their sexual chemistry is obvious to everyone. Even to those who haven’t seen them together, since they like to flaunt the hickeys on their body. But something changes in their equation when the hickey becomes a bridge of memory that leads to an old sexual encounter Meghna had which Karthik finds out about. Will Meghna be able to help Karthik erase the marks of her past? Or will Karthik just to have to wake up to a realization that the past, even though it haunts, might not be real.

programme.title: Dum Dum Deega Deega
programme.desc: The solution to your problem is often hidden in the problem itself; all you need is a different outlook. The story of a beggar child, Ajju, who lives on the streets of Mumbai, but dreams big. He challenges his unfortunate fate, with nothing but a 'different outlook' towards the situation he faces.

programme.title: Naamkaran
programme.desc: When it comes to new beginnings, families have a way of always being there. Sometimes it's as simple as a good- morning forward. But for Jay, it's something slightly more dramatic. Watch Naamkaran, as Jay and his (uninvited) family take on a new challenge.

programme.title: One Faith
programme.desc: Sometimes, all it takes for a melting pot to turn into a blazing furnace is a mere spark. Especially in a country like ours, where multiple faiths co-exist and cross paths every day. This is the day in the life of India, where two dominant forces face-off in a battle of who-blinks-first. And only one faith will triumph.

programme.title: Exchange Offer
programme.desc: A complaint registered to the manufacturing company for a dead computer brings back nostalgia and surprises in the life of a retired school principle who is living a mundane life.

programme.title: Laugh
programme.desc: A film about who we were and who we've become , how socialising was and where its reached ,how something as simple as laughing has taken a complicated turn

programme.title: Bena

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: 10 years ago, a boy abandoned his alcoholic mother. Now a man, he returns to meet her.

programme.title: Aamad
programme.desc: "Aamad" in essence is the story of a father and son and their shared inheritance of loss. An inheritance that tears them apart and yet binds them together. Abhay returns home to find his father on his deathbed. Old painful memories resurface. Will he be able to make amends for the faults of his past? As his father passes on, will this be Abhay’s rites of passage? Will Abhay heed the call of the bloodline, despite the tinkering strains of the past?

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Breaking up ≠ getting over someone right? ‘Yesterday’ is a window into the most emotionally eventful 24 hours that Gautam has had in years.

programme.title: L
programme.desc: A mother's dream of riding a scooter is not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: Agarbatti
programme.desc: Bhola, who is mentally challenged but still manages to survive by himself, selling incense sticks on the roads. An accident takes place near bhola, he doesn’t see the person clearly who is driving the car. Will he be able to tell the police about this incident?

programme.title: Harmless
programme.desc: A boy down on his luck. A girl looking for thrills. A plot is hatched. A kidnapping is staged. As far as crimes go, this one seems harmless. But, as with all things, there is a price to pay. A hefty price. Harmless begins as a crime-thriller and develops into a dramatic adventure with a little bit of romance thrown in.

programme.title: Sky Sharks
programme.desc: Deep in the ice of the antarctic, a team of geologists uncover an old Nazi warship still intact where dark experiments had occurred. In order to conquer the world, the Nazis created rocket-powered sharks whose pilots are genetically mutated, super soldiers with supernatural powers who were able to fly & destroy

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: Spytime
programme.desc: Anacleto, a former secret agent, is forced to come out of retirement and protect his son, Adolfo, when his arch-enemy, Vazquez, breaks out of prison and targets him

programme.title: The Free Fall
programme.desc: The Free Fall is a deeply personal horror thriller, a mind bending pressure cooker that constantly challenges us, hurling us towards one of the most shocking cinematic reveals imaginable. After attempting to take her own life, a young woman must wrestle with an overbearing husband and the only way out of this hell, is to fall into it.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. The film gathers an ensemble of gifted, dynamic new-generation stars – Tom Hardy, Shia LaBeouf, Jessica Chastain, Jason Clarke, Mia Wasikowska, Dane DeHaan – alongside two of the finest actors of their generations, Guy Pearce and Gary Oldman. A riveting, intense story of Crime and Corruption, Loyalty and Love, Brutality and Tenderness, LAWLESS is a rich addition to the American Gangster Canon.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: Rebel
programme.desc: A young man leaves Belgium to help war victims in Syria, but is forced to join an armed group and is left stranded in AL Raqqa. While at home his little brother becomes easy prey for jihadi recruiters. The only thing their mother has left with is to protect: her Son.

programme.title: Haywire

programme.title: Rememory
programme.desc: You can’t escape them. They’re everywhere. They bring tears to our eyes. They make us laugh. They bring us pain. Gordon a visionary inventor of the Rememory machine that allows him to see memories. He dies in his office. Is it murder? Sam investigates by using the machine "borrowed" from Gordon's wife. He looks at memories of others involved. REMEMORY is a noir mystery Thriller.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: American Boogeywoman
programme.desc: True Story that follows America’s most notorious Female Serial killer. Based on Aileen Wuorno’s early life. Back in 1976 a young Aileen arrives in Florida searching for a new life, marries a wealthy yacht club president to start as part of Florida’s high society. Tormented by her inner demons she surrenders to her murderous impulses havoc in the peaceful community.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: Every 23rd spring for 23days, it gets to eat…Stranded on a lonely road, a school bus full of high school players must defend themselves from the Creeper, the winged, flesh-eating terror - ancient beast that resurfaces on the earth every 23 years to feed.

programme.title: King Lear
programme.desc: King Lear poses the question: What does it mean to be human? Its subtitle could be Being Human. Cruelty, barbarity, savagery, kindness, tenderness, love, in a world that gives not very much back. Set in the fictional present, an aging King invites disaster when he abdicates to his corrupt, toadying daughters, and rejects his loving and honest one.

programme.title: Jurassic Attack
programme.desc: A group of soldiers attempting to rescue a hostage from a terrorist crash land into unfamiliar jungles which are inhabited by a group of long hidden dinosaurs. Now they must find a way out of this isolated valley before becoming prey for prehistoric predators.

programme.title: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: This timeless tale was originally written in 1757. Could Beauty ever love the ghastly lord, the Beast? The year is 1810. After losing his fortune at sea, a bankrupt merchant poor father-of-six, after plucking a scented rose from the repulsive master's garden must do the impossible, permit his daughter Beauty, to take his place and pay for the parent’s sins. Only true love can break the spell.

programme.title: Rememory
programme.desc: You can’t escape them. They’re everywhere. They bring tears to our eyes. They make us laugh. They bring us pain. Gordon a visionary inventor of the Rememory machine that allows him to see memories. He dies in his office. Is it murder? Sam investigates by using the machine "borrowed" from Gordon's wife. He looks at memories of others involved. REMEMORY is a noir mystery Thriller.

programme.title: Maa Beti
programme.desc: Savitri, a wealthy woman who dies during childbirth. Her husband remarries Laxmi, who, influenced by her brother Raghunandan, mistreats Savitri’s children, Meenu and Khetan. The children run away, and years later, Laxmi's daughter, Chanda, discovers the truth about her half-siblings and their tragic past

programme.title: Kangan
programme.desc: Sunil lives a middle-classed lifestyle in a village in India along with his widowed mom, Janki. He is studying Medicine in the city, is in love with his childhood sweetheart, Shanta, and everyone expects them to get married soon. However, Janki does not approve of Shanta, finds her uncouth and illiterate, and instead approves of Shobha and arranges Sunil's marriage with her.

programme.title: Tum Haseen Main Jawan
programme.desc: A navy officer who has had a number of affairs with attractive young women meets a beautiful girl and falls in love. Though she loves him in return, another admirer of hers tells the officer that she is deceiving him and is the mother of a child.

programme.title: Sautela Bhai
programme.desc: Tulsiram is a village teacher who is married to Saraswati and has a step-brother, Rajaram, who lives in Bombay. When Rajaram returns, Tulsiram wants him to marry someone he has chosen but he has already chosen a wife.

programme.title: Jigar
programme.desc: Duryodhan, a wrestler, is Raju's friend, but due to a misunderstanding he molests and murders his sister. Raju seeks Baba Thakur's help to train in martial arts to avenge his sister's death.

programme.title: Pratigyabadh
programme.desc: After her husband travels to Bombay to try to make some money in order to pay back a loan to local money-lender Lala Sukhilal, Laxmi is left lonely and apprehensive with her three children. When they fail to hear from him for months Sukhilal offers to help as long as Laxmi becomes intimate with him, but when she refuses he decides to repossess their home and belongings as repayment for the loan.

programme.title: Sautela Bhai
programme.desc: Tulsiram is a village teacher who is married to Saraswati and has a step-brother, Rajaram, who lives in Bombay. When Rajaram returns, Tulsiram wants him to marry someone he has chosen but he has already chosen a wife.

programme.title: Pratigyabadh
programme.desc: After her husband travels to Bombay to try to make some money in order to pay back a loan to local money-lender Lala Sukhilal, Laxmi is left lonely and apprehensive with her three children. When they fail to hear from him for months Sukhilal offers to help as long as Laxmi becomes intimate with him, but when she refuses he decides to repossess their home and belongings as repayment for the loan.

programme.title: Jigar
programme.desc: Duryodhan, a wrestler, is Raju's friend, but due to a misunderstanding he molests and murders his sister. Raju seeks Baba Thakur's help to train in martial arts to avenge his sister's death.

programme.title: Bade Ghar Ki Beti
programme.desc: Mala is a poor girl who marries into a wealthy family at the behest of a patriarch. However, after his death, she must deal with abusive relatives and yet strive to restore harmony in the family.

programme.title: Santosh
programme.desc: A wealthy woman falls in love with a poor man, whom she marries and has a child with, but soon she longs for her old life and abandons both her husband and son. She remarries a rich man, with whom she has another son. Years later, the two boys find themselves on opposite sides of a struggle.

programme.title: The Murderer
programme.desc: A hotel musician's life takes a turn for the unexpected after his admirer's presumed suicide. Considered a prime suspect himself, he does some investigation and comes to realize that the case is far more twisted than it appeared.

programme.title: Kitne Door Kitne Paas
programme.desc: After studying in New York City, Jatin (Fardeen Khan) is returning home to India, where he's set to marry a woman from his hometown. On his flight to Delhi, he meets Karishma (Amrita Arora), coincidentally on her way to her own marriage, and her quick temper instantly sets them at odds. Once in Delhi, the unlikely travel companions find their connecting flight has been cancelled, so Jatin and Karishma must share a long bus ride to Gujarat, discovering each other and themselves in the process.

programme.title: Filhaal
programme.desc: When Sia watches her best friend Rewa slip into depression because of her inability to bear a child, she offers to be her surrogate. Trouble brews when jealousy finds its way into their relationship.

programme.title: Shootout At Wadala
programme.desc: A crime-action film based on a true story. The movie depicts the rise of a gangster, who becomes a force to be reckoned within Mumbai's criminal underworld. It also highlights the police's efforts to capture him and the infamous shootout that took place in Wadala- Mumbai. The film features themes of power, revenge, and justice in a gritty and violent setting.

programme.title: Koi Aap Sa
programme.desc: A film that centers around a young man who develops feelings for his childhood friend, who is already in a committed relationship. As he tries to move on, he falls in love with another woman. However, things become complicated when his childhood friend realizes her own feelings for him.

programme.title: Pyar Ki Takkar (dub) (aranmanai Kaavalan -Tamil)
programme.desc: A large family returns to an ancestral property (palace) to sell it off. Meanwhile they discover some supernatural elements in the palace.

programme.title: Aashiq
programme.desc: Pooja and Chander fall in love and want to be together. However, since Pooja's alcoholic father would never approve, she decides to run away from her house but, unfortunately, lands in a brothel.

programme.title: Ragini Mms 2
programme.desc: A director attempts to shoot an erotic horror movie in a house where, unbeknown to him, a demonic spirit resides. Even before the crew starts filming, the spirit possesses the lead actress's body.

programme.title: Sun Zara
programme.desc: Trisha is mesmerised by aspiring singer Rohit's voice. After the two fall in love, Trisha meets with an accident and loses her eyesight.

programme.title: Koi Aap Sa
programme.desc: A film that centers around a young man who develops feelings for his childhood friend, who is already in a committed relationship. As he tries to move on, he falls in love with another woman. However, things become complicated when his childhood friend realizes her own feelings for him.

programme.title: Aashiq
programme.desc: Pooja and Chander fall in love and want to be together. However, since Pooja's alcoholic father would never approve, she decides to run away from her house but, unfortunately, lands in a brothel.

programme.title: Provoked
programme.desc: A Punjabi woman, who was abused by her husband for 10 years. After killing her husband in self-defense, Ahluwalia is imprisoned as those close to her fight to set her free.

programme.title: Dost
programme.desc: Two brothers reunite in order to fulfil the wish of their dying father whom Thakur bitterly humiliates and murders. They intend to marry Thakur's two daughters to seek revenge.

programme.title: Blissful Beats
programme.desc: Soothing melodies that calm your soul. Let these peaceful tunes create your perfect moment of serenity. A carefully curated collection of rhythms to help you unwind.

programme.title: Disco Dancer
programme.desc: Bring back the flashy disco vibes with this sensational Disco Dancer jukebox. Whether you're a retro lover or a new-age dancer, these beats will keep you moving!

programme.title: Gane Naye Purane
programme.desc: Relive the golden era of music with classic melodies, retro rhythms, and timeless tunes that never fade. A nostalgic trip for true old-school lovers!

programme.title: Kumar Sanu Alka Yagnik
programme.desc: Fall in love all over again with Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik! Their magical duets—full of passion, heartbreak, and nostalgia—are pure 90s gold.

programme.title: R D Burman – Musical Maverick
programme.desc: A powerhouse collection of R.D. Burman's iconic hits, blending innovation, emotion, and energy. From soulful ballads to electrifying grooves, experience the genius of Pancham Da that defined Bollywood's golden soundscape.

programme.title: Best Of 70s – The Golden Era
programme.desc: Step into Bollywood’s most soulful decade with this jukebox of evergreen melodies. A rich tapestry of romance, innocence, and timeless charm – pure nostalgia from the golden 70s.

programme.title: Best Of 90s – Filmy Beats Reloaded
programme.desc: Take a ride through the vibrant 90s with peppy love anthems, dramatic duets, and emotional melodies. This jukebox celebrates the signature style of Bollywood's musical revival decade.

programme.title: Rajesh Khanna – The Superstar's Anthems
programme.desc: Revisit the unmatched charm of Rajesh Khanna with this jukebox of unforgettable melodies. Romantic, philosophical, and heartfelt – these songs defined an era and a superstar.

programme.title: Jeetendra Hits The Jumping Jack
programme.desc: Dive into Jeetendra’s iconic hits—The Jumping Jack’s timeless energy! Relive the magic of Bollywood’s golden era with foot-tapping beats, romance, and pure nostalgia!

programme.title: Neetu Singh Evergreen Hits
programme.desc: Turn up the retro vibes with Neetu Singh’s greatest hits! A birthday playlist packed with nostalgia, romance, and endless charm.

programme.title: Superhits Of 90s
programme.desc: Relive the '90s with Superhits! Romantic melodies, peppy beats, and timeless nostalgia—dance, sing along, and fall in love all over again!

programme.title: Dharmendra He Man Of Bollywood
programme.desc: Time-travel through Dharmendra's iconic hits – the ultimate He-Man of Bollywood! Timeless romance, unforgettable melodies that define an era of pure masala magic!

programme.title: Alka Yagnik Superhit Singer
programme.desc: Press play on nostalgia! Alka Yagnik's velvet voice brings back memories with these evergreen hits that still give us goosebumps today.

programme.title: Dimple Kapadia & Neetu Singh
programme.desc: Dance through the disco era with Dimple & Neetu! Playful whispers, foot-tapping romance, and melodies that defined a generation’s dreams.

programme.title: Mithun Chakraborty
programme.desc: Get ready to groove with Mithun Da's greatest hits! From 'Disco Dancer' to romantic ballads, this collection is pure Bollywood retro gold.

programme.title: Best Of B R Chopra
programme.desc: Dive into these timeless tracks that shaped Hindi cinema's musical heritage. The golden touch of B.R. Chopra - where every song became legendary.

programme.title: Hema Malini Parveen Babi Hit Bollywood Divas
programme.desc: The Original Bollywood Divas! Hema's elegance + Parveen's sass = Unbeatable 70s magic. Press play for nostalgia in every note!

programme.title: Dance Hits
programme.desc: Pure nostalgia on the dance floor! Celebrate the vibrant sounds of old-school Hindi dance music with timeless beats and retro charm.

programme.desc: Iconic melodies of Amitabh Bachchan reflecting romance,pride, and cinematic brilliance.

programme.desc: Dwarfs on the Run: Chhotu and Motu loot stores; Raju identifies them during a Holi celebration.

programme.title: Mighty Raju Into The Future & Sab Ka Ghar
programme.desc: Cheeky's future projector helps Raju save his dad from a jewel thief at the airport.

programme.title: Luv Kushh The Enchanted Dolls & Magical Herb
programme.desc: Luv, Kush stop enchanted dolls.

programme.title: Chorr Police Joyride & Slippery As Ice
programme.desc: At an amusement park, Anthony picks pockets, leading to a chase with Inspector Lovely Singh, but he escapes, leaving Singh frustrated.

programme.title: Dude Ep 02
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 03
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 04
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 05
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 01
programme.desc: In a busy hospital, Trisha faces a tough night when an accident victim is rushed into the emergency ward. As she works to save his life, the victim’s panicked father lashes out at her, demanding faster treatment. But Trisha stays calm, knowing that fear often comes out as anger.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 02
programme.desc: Trisha steps up when it matters most. When a man begins to choke and the situation turns critical, Trisha doesn’t hesitate. With calm precision and unmatched courage, she performs a high-stakes procedure all on her own. What happens next is nothing short of remarkable. Her quick thinking and skill become the difference between life and death. Watch how one nurse turns pressure into action.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 03
programme.desc: Trisha decides to take a long leave from the hospital to spend much-needed time with her family. Just as she steps away, the hospital is hit with a major emergency. Without hesitation, Trisha returns to duty, putting others before herself and becoming a true hero in a time of crisis. Watch this heartfelt story of courage, sacrifice, and the dilemma between duty and family.

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 01
programme.desc: n Harshil’s mohalla, love arrives every Diwali — bright, sparkly… but never quite complete Every year he promises himself — this time I’ll confess! But between mithai, fireworks and nerves… he ends up saying, “maybe next Diwali.” This year, he’s all set to confess his love to his Diwali wali dost — but will she say yes? Or will a new twist steal the spotlight?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 02
programme.desc: In Harshil’s mohalla, love has finally met its competition. After years of dancing through every Diwali together, Anamika now takes the floor with Vishal — and suddenly, it’s not just a performance, it’s personal.

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 03
programme.desc: Harshil ke chehre pe muskaan kam aur dard zyada nazar aa raha hai — kyunki ab Anamika aur Vishal ki “perfect jodi” ek "forever jodi" banne jaa rahi hai. Par iss kahani mein sab kuch utna simple nahi jitna lagta hai — Vishal ne bhi dekh liya hai wo bond… wo Mohalle Wala Pyaar Kya usse lagega kuch gadbad hai? Kya Anamika samajh payegi kya chubh raha hai Harshil ko? Aur kya iss Diwali… ek dil tootega ya do dil judenge?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 04
programme.desc: This Diwali, not just diyas — hearts are breaking too Vishal’s jealousy has sparked a storm, and Harshil’s world just fell apart. One Ghargula shattered… but along with it, so did a bond built over years. Will Anamika see the truth before it’s too late?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 05
programme.desc: The fights. The silence. The misunderstandings. It all comes down to this night. As the mohalla lights up for Diwali, two hearts are still trying to find their way back to each other. Will Harshil and Anamika finally find their way back… or lose each other forever?

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 01
programme.desc: Episode 1 of Office Dancers takes you inside the world of three ordinary office-goers with one extraordinary secret — they are the dancing stars no one sees coming. By day, they’re buried in emails, meetings, and deadlines. By night, they’re chasing rhythm, passion, and dreams that refuse to stay hidden. This is where their journey begins — full of chaos, comedy, and courage.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 02
programme.desc: Our three office rebels are back — and the chaos only gets bigger. Between never-ending deadlines, secret rehearsals, and the constant fear of getting caught… will their double life survive another day? ?? This episode is a reminder that sometimes the smallest victories — a dance step nailed, a dream defended, a smile shared — are the ones that keep us alive in the middle of all the madness.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 03
programme.desc: The helmets are still on, but the stakes just got higher. Our office dancers are juggling tighter deadlines, tougher bosses, and an even bigger risk of exposure. In this episode, friendships are tested, rivalries heat up, and every beat brings them closer to the truth. Because sometimes the hardest battle isn’t with the world outside — it’s with the fear inside.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 04
programme.desc: An anonymous email lands in the inbox.With the threat ticking, our office dancers scramble to lock their alibis, juggle brutal deadlines, and figure out who’s watching. Trust wobbles, secrets leak, and every rehearsal feels like a trap. Will the masks stay on—or is this the episode their identities finally crack?

programme.title: Kuch Love Jaisa Ep 04

programme.title: Office Ka Pyaar Ep 02

programme.title: Main Krishna Hoon
programme.desc: Krishna, an orphan, lives in an orphanage. He feels unwanted as all his friends have found someone to adopt them. However, his sadness turns into happiness when Lord Krishna comes to his aid.

programme.title: Kochadaiiyaan The Legend Hindi
programme.desc: Rana, a noble warrior, seeks revenge against his father's killer, Rishikodagan. Meanwhile, he also upsets and attracts the ire of the enemy kingdom's ruler, Raja Mahendran.

programme.title: Ishq Actually
programme.desc: Gia is an emotional romantic drama about a woman caught between two loves—Neil and Kabir. Standing at a turning point in life, she must choose between two different worlds while following her heart. The film explores love, destiny, and the life-changing choices that shape true happiness.

programme.title: Shamitabh
programme.desc: A mute, aspiring actor joins forces with a man who has a powerful voice. Together they take the film industry by storm, but will their egos get in the way?

programme.title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
programme.desc: A girl decides to sprint out of her own wedding and has people from not one but two countries chasing after her.

programme.title: Salaam-E-Ishq
programme.desc: Six couples face problems in their lives when fate forces them to move away from each other. They must overcome these issues in order to make their love triumphant.

programme.title: Jeet Lengey Jahaan
programme.desc: Jeet Lengey Jahaan is about today's youngsters who are starving to achieve their goals in life. It shows how they get trapped into our corrupt system and face adverse circumstances and finally find themselves helpless and how they fight against it by their own ways.

programme.title: Aligarh
programme.desc: Based on true events, a university professor is sacked from his job on charges of homosexuality.

programme.title: Phobia
programme.desc: Mehak, a talented artist, develops agoraphobia after a taxi driver assaults her. She moves to a new apartment and starts having visions, leading her to think that a malevolent force has possessed her.

programme.title: Baat Ban Gayi
programme.desc: Witness the extraordinary story of an immortal warrior.

programme.title: Sniff
programme.desc: Witness the adventures of India's first-ever spy superhero Sunny Gill, who's out to solve mysteries with his powerful nose!

programme.title: Chaahat Ek Nasha
programme.desc: Watch four lives get entangled in this tale of passion and obsession.

programme.title: Rockstar
programme.desc: Delhi boy Janardhan dreams of becoming a rockstar and falls for Heer. Heartbreak fuels his rise to fame, turning his pain into music as he transforms into a celebrated artist.

programme.title: Koyelaanchal
programme.desc: Koyelaanchal is the story of Saryu Bhan Singh, a ruthless Mafioso and Nisheeth Kumar, an upright District Collector who face off in a most unusual way.

programme.title: Golmaal In White House
programme.desc: Hai Golmaal In White House is a 1973 Indian Malayalam film, directed by Salar Shaikh. The film stars Rajpal Yadav, Govind Namdeo, Pratima Kazmi, Vijay Raaz, Yashpal Sharma in lead roles. The film had musical score by Shamir Tandon.

programme.title: Jo Dooba So Paar
programme.desc: Keshu is hardly interested in the routine business of life. His life changes when he meets an Indian-Italian girl who is in India as part of her research.

programme.title: Hota Hai Dil Pyaar Mein Paagal
programme.desc: Two friends fight it out to win the hand of the girl they love - and they will pull all stops to win her heart!

programme.title: Haathi Mere Saathi
programme.desc: Watch the bond between humans & elephants with Bandev’s story as he fights for the protection of his ele-friends. Witness the rage on ‘Haathi Mere Saathi’, full movie streaming in Hindi on Eros Now.

programme.title: Bawri Chhori
programme.desc: Radhika whose husband leaves her & goes away to London. Radhika waits for her husband to return, but her wait turns into frustration & she decides to go to London to take revenge.

programme.title: Dhama Chaukdi
programme.desc: Four underworld dons - Mani Aiyer from Madras, Pappu Yadav from Bihar, Lallan Pyare from UP and Sanjay Apte from Mumbai - are staunch enemies, having businesses in Mumbai. What happens as a result of this rivalry?

programme.title: Kashmir Daily
programme.desc: Kashmir Daily Story of a Journalist. It highlights the core problems faced by today's generation of Unemployment and Drugs. From the origin of humanity, it has always been a battle between Good and Evil.
